name: Galdera Labs
oneliner: AI-native financial modeling platform that replaces static planning cycles with continuously updated, queryable models — built by Klarna's former FP&A leads.
finserv: Founded by three former Klarna employees who managed financial planning across 26 markets during the company's hypergrowth period. Purpose-built for fast-growing organisations with complex, multi-market financial operations — exactly the profile of scaled fintechs and financial services firms facing planning fragmentation.
team: Evan Rumpza (CEO), Mattia Scolari, and Giovanni Casula — all former Klarna. Round led by J12 Ventures, with participation from Antler and angels from Klarna, DeepL, Stripe, and Plata.
thesis: This gives you a potential partner or acquisition target in the FP&A agent layer — the tools that sit between your data infrastructure and your finance teams. As AI agents begin handling treasury, forecasting, and scenario planning, the team that built financial planning infrastructure for one of Europe's most complex fintechs is now productising that capability. Whoever owns the financial modeling layer within a bank or wealth manager's agentic stack becomes deeply embedded in decision-making workflows.
evidence: Klarna veterans launch Galdera with €1.5M for AI financial modeling
